calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Carl E. Johnstons Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Emil Stan and Betty Stan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Michael J. Raifsnider, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Carl E. Johnston, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Emil Stan or Betty Stan.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on August 24, 2018, and personally served on defendant Betty Stan on August 25, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Emil Stan occurred on October 15, 2018 and was effectuated on October 25, 2018.
Default as to defendant Betty Stan was entered on October 1, 2018.
Default as to defendant Emil Stan was entered on December 13, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on Augst 14, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Carl E. Johnston, and against the defaulted defendants Emil Stan and Betty Stan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $85,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $41,569.55.
Costs - $692.00.
Minus Credits - $2,400.00.
Total - $125,361.55.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
